allow: PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\seeke\\Downloads\\rich man assests 3"; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Recurse -Force; $filesByExt = @{}; foreach\($f in $files\) { if\(!$f.PSIsContainer\) { $ext = if\($f.Extension\) { $f.Extension } else { "<no ext>" }; if\(!$filesByExt[$ext]\) { $filesByExt[$ext] = @{count=0; size=0} } $filesByExt[$ext].count += 1; $filesByExt[$ext].size += $f.Length } }; $filesByExt.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object -Property @{Expression={$_.Value.count}; Descending=$true} | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value.count\) files, $\('{0:N0}' -f $_.Value.size\) bytes" })
